meaning: n.动物的触须,触毛,触角,试探性的建议
examples: Measuring clearance reduction with a feeler gauge.
Be sure nothing interferes with the sweep of the feeler arm.
I am putting out feeler to see if he'd like to come and work for us.
"My speculation is that this might be a feeler to see if there's any backlash from society, " al-Nafjan said.
